channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ohio voting rights group under criminal fraud investigation, sources say
item.description: The FBI executed a search warrant at an Ohio-based voter registration group as part of a fraud investigation.

item.title: Notable Deaths in 2026
item.description: A look back at the esteemed personalities who have died this year, who touched us with their innovation, creativity and humanity.

item.title: WATCH: Viral teen umpire goes 'Bananas'
item.description: Eighteen-year-old little league umpire Sawyer Sparks has made headlines for his on-field antics and now has a chance to work a game for the wildly popular team.

item.title: 11 victims in Midland, Texas, shooting; at least 1 dead: Officials
item.description: At least 11 victims have been reported in an active shooter situation in Midland, Texas, on Friday morning, with at least one person dead.
